purpose: Meta-cycle command that walks the plugin's back-catalogue of retros and derives pipeline-improvement backlog items for the plugin-development repo. The lead executes this command directly; no outer-loop subagent.

public_api.name: retros-derive command
public_api.description: Reads ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/retros/<plugin-slug>/*.md, extracts un-annotated meta-level findings sorted oldest-first, and passes them to base:project-curator for autonomous decision-making against this repo's BACKLOG.md.

external_ports: BACKLOG.md at repo root (write, via curator)
test_targets: AC-DERIVE-1: file exists, lead-executed (no outer-loop subagent)
AC-DERIVE-3: oldest-first by completed: YAML field; files without field go last
AC-DERIVE-4: six-level section-matching priority documented with all exclusions
AC-DERIVE-5: dedup guard skips findings with _Curator: .*_ line
AC-DERIVE-6: invokes base:project-curator with this repo and BACKLOG.md
AC-DERIVE-8: per-file errors surfaced in report; command continues after failure
AC-DERIVE-9: final report has N scanned, M processed, K skipped, decisions applied, annotated file paths
